pi_items.source: Dataset column names in bfi.csv and extraction script

privileged_info_summary: The BFI25 dataset is real, derived from the 'bfi' dataset in the 'psych' R package (Revelle, 2010). For the five Openness items (O1-O5), there are 10 unique pairs. Ground truth analysis confirms all 10 pairs have statistically significant Spearman correlations (p < 0.05). The strongest correlation is O1_O3 (rho = 0.414). The weakest correlation is O2_O4 (rho = -0.116). Other expected correlations: O1_O2 (-0.263), O2_O5 (0.348), and O4_O5 (-0.240).
